---
id: get-signature-observer
title: "Get an observer of a signature request"
description: "Returns the observer with the `OBSERVER_ID` from the `SignatureRequest`"
sidebar_label: "Get an observer of a signature request"

api:

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an observer of a signature request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/signature-requests/{SR_ID}/observers/{OBSERVER_ID}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the observer with the `OBSERVER_ID` from the `SignatureRequest`
with the ID `SR_ID`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
